features: USE FOR BED PADS: ViraCare Incontinence Bed Pads are designed to ensure dry surfaces.Our bed mats disposable provides high levels of comfort and a good night sleep. Bed mats can be used on all types of furniture.

DISPOSABLE & HYGIENIC: Disposable pads are designed to be more hygienic and easier to use. Each pad, once used, needs to be disposed thus minimising the clean-up. Bed wetting sheets keeps all furniture clean and fresh. Bed protector incontinenceconsist of a soft top layer with 100% waterproof backing making them highly reliable and effective.

MULTI PURPOSE USE: ViraCare underpads can be used for all ages. Dry nights bed mats includes use for children, women, elderly, or disabled people suffering from incontinence. Waterproof bed pad scan be used at personal and nursing homes, clinics on couches, bed mattresses, chairs, mats for training, incontinence, and maternity.

HIGH ABSORPTION : Our absorbent bed pads are built with high levels of SAP which provides quick and high levels of absorption.Our incontinence sheets for bed keeps the user comfortable and reduces irritation.Bed mat built with fluff adds to this providing a soft, relaxing, and comfortable feel to the user providing a good night’s sleep.
